message:
Add new hooks and components for premium UI interaction layer

New hooks:
- useMousePosition: Tracks cursor position as percentages within
  an element, used by PromptCard for 3D tilt and glow effects
- usePrecisionHaptic: Wraps navigator.vibrate with configurable
  patterns for tactile feedback on mobile interactions

New components:
- TerminalStream: Typewriter-style text reveal that simulates
  terminal output streaming, used in PromptCard content previews
- HeroBackground: Animated gradient mesh background for the hero
  section with subtle motion and depth
- AgenticScan: Visual scanning/analysis animation effect
- desktop/MouseSpotlight: Cursor-following radial spotlight overlay
  for desktop hover states
- desktop/GridTransition: Animated grid layout transition wrapper

These are dependencies of the upcoming UI redesign across the card,
hero, and layout components.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
